title: The Footballest 2: The Mystery of the Pirate Treasure
original_title: Los futbolísimos  2 y el misterio del tesoro pirata
overview: The Soto Alto football team, formed by Pakete and his friends, is at risk of being kicked out of the league. Thanks to a scam by a property development company, they’ve lost their pitch and now Los Justos, the team from a local reform school, looks set to take their place.

trailers.title: LOS FUTBOLÍSIMOS 2: EL MISTERIO DEL TESORO PIRATA. Tráiler oficial. 8 de agosto en cines.
